meaning: n.小牛的皮,犊皮所制的革
examples: The book cover is made of fine calfskin leather.
Made of silver calfskin, its flap shines with silver Shade Crystal Mesh.
Each shoe is designed with calfskin lining and cushion insoles to provide comfort.
It was at this point that he had purchased his calfskin logbook, in which all human statement and opinion recurred.
It is thought that the pigmentation on a part of the calfskin manuscript has been affected, and that it could have been due to vibration on the flight.
